title: Darkness
description: A funny horror mod. Not really horror but very annoying.
body:
# Darkness Mod

A funny "horror" mod. Not really horror, but very annoying.

### What it adds
This mod adds a few things to make Minecraft more chaotic:

* A sleep deprivation system that messes with the day/night cycle.
* Random jumpscare sound effects to drive you insane.
* Eating beetroots may summon or kill **Black**, a very fast zombie that is tough to deal with and will chase you forever.
* Basically turns you into a gambler who bets their life every time they eat.

### Why you might want it
If you want a survival world that feels cursed, unpredictable, and slightly evil, this mod is for you. It mixes horror, humor, and chaos — perfect for pranking friends or challenging yourself to survive through the madness.

### Installation

* Requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
* Drop the `.jar` file (found in [versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/darknessmod/versions)) into your `mods/` folder.

### Notes

* Requires **Fabric Loader** and **Fabric API**.
* Works on Minecraft 1.20+ (tested with Fabric).
* Place the `.jar` file in your `mods/` folder to install.
* Expect random noises, sudden attacks, and zero peace.
* Don’t eat too many beetroots.
* You’ve been warned.
